name: Visit Video Logger
releaseNotes: Applies the camera-preview aspect readback fix to the front-camera picture-in-picture recorder as well. Both rear and front recorder paths now size their TextureView readback buffers from the active camera preview aspect before rotation and center-crop composition, reducing horizontal stretch in the saved MP4.
description: Visit Video Logger records driving or travel videos with a composed camera, map, GPS, heading, speed, timestamp, and optional front-camera picture-in-picture overlay. It includes stationary GPS/compass smoothing, camera-aspect-safe recording composition, rear infinity-focus support where available, and a black-screen recording mode for lower distraction and battery use.
